subtopics.label: Canadian Wildfire Smoke Affecting Great Lakes Air Quality
subtopics.summary: Discussions focus on Canadian wildfire smoke causing significant air quality issues across the Great Lakes region and Upper Midwest [3lqvq52qfo22x, 3lvqcsi4o6k2f]. This smoke has led to air quality alerts and, at times, some of the worst air quality globally [3lqvq52qfo22x]. The posts describe the smoke as plaguing and being stagnant or circulating over the region [3lqvq52qfo22x, 3lvqcsi4o6k2f, 3lvqcfvhots2f].

key_quotes.quote: Wildfire smoke from Canada plagues the Upper Midwest and Great Lakes region.
key_quotes.note: This quote clearly links the source of the smoke to its widespread negative impact on the Great Lakes area.

key_quotes.quote: Canadian wildfire smoke continues to be stagnant over the Great Lakes
key_quotes.note: This highlights the persistent presence and specific geographic focus of the smoke affecting the Great Lakes.

key_quotes.quote: it had the second-worst air quality among the world
key_quotes.note: This statement conveys the severity and global significance of the air quality degradation experienced in the affected region.

subtopics.label: DEC Air Quality Advisories for Lake Ontario
subtopics.summary: This cluster discusses air quality health advisories issued by the Department of Environmental Conservation (DEC) for regions including Eastern Lake Ontario and Western New York [3ltz7begjxk2y, 3lqxjko7z5k2z, 3lr45upnxlk2c]. These advisories concern pollutants such as ozone and fine particles [3ltz7begjxk2y]. The posts provide links to Air Quality Index (AQI) forecasts and an air quality hotline number [3ltz7begjxk2y, 3lqxjko7z5k2z, 3lr45upnxlk2c], with a recommendation for vulnerable groups to take precautions [3lr45upnxlk2c].

key_quotes.quote: air quality health advisory for ozone for Eastern Lake Ontario
key_quotes.note: This quote highlights the specific type of advisory and the primary geographic focus of the discussion.
This phrase emphasizes the public health aspect and the recommended action for at-risk populations.

key_quotes.quote: issued an air quality health advisory today
key_quotes.note: This quote represents the recurring announcement of air quality health advisories by authorities.
